name: Aces Pickleball and Kitchen
description: Entertainment facility includes a full-service restaurant and bar, 30 Hi-Def TV's, yard games such as cornhole, shuffleboard, ping pong, and Connect Four.  Expansive patio space with heated pergolas and firepits.  Adjacent to a dog park.  The courts can be reserved by calling the Guest Services desk at 513-778-8552 or through our reservation system (CourtReserve).  Court costs are based on Guest or Membership court fee cost.
open_play_schedule: Pickleball Courts are open from 8 AM to 10 PM every day (excluding select holidays)
fees: Fee required — Memberships are available.  See details on acespickelball.com/ pickleball/ memberships.

name: Beechmont Racquet & Fitness
description: Beechmont Racquet & Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cincinnati, OH. There are 16 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved.
